headline: 3 Reasons TMO is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, Thermo Fisher’s shares have sunk to $464.50, producing a disappointing 17.4% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 10.9% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
